title: Don't Do Death Despawn
description: This mod prevents items from despawning if they were dropped as a result of a player death
body:
# Don't Do Death Despawn

This is a teeny-tiny mod that prevents items from despawning if they were dropped as a result of a player death.
(It does this, if you're interested, by adding `Age: -32768` to the item entitiy NBT)
